text.title: Prompt Portability Across Providers Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: support-bot dual stack Claude Opus 4.7 + GPT-5 Pro.

section.title: Worked example
section.p: Team: Faion ML-engineering. Task: prepare support-bot for dual-provider operation.
Step 1. Providers matrix: Anthropic (`claude-opus-4-7`) primary, OpenAI (`gpt-5-pro`) fallback. Both docs URLs pinned.
Step 2. Audit: 12 prompts use Claude XML `<thinking>` + 8 use OpenAI `developer` role + 3 free-form. Tool catalog: 7 functions, schemas only Anthropic-style.
Step 3. Abstraction layer: `tool_and_system` (both tools and roles diverge). tool_schema_adapter: `faion.adapters.tools.universal_v2`.

Step 4. Refusal policy: `git://faion/safety/refusal.md@a1b2c3d`. Adapter mapping: Anthropic returns `stop_reason=refusal`, OpenAI returns `finish_reason=content_filter` — both surface to caller as `RefusedByPolicy`.
Result. Migration job consumes spec → emits dual-provider prompt suite at `prompts/support-bot/{anthropic,openai}.yaml`.
